description_long: This is a semi-circular outdoor stage with a dark wooden floor and a raised platform, flanked by two sets of stairs on either side. The stage features three large backdrop panels with vivid graphics, supported by metal trusses, and a central emblem or logo embedded in the floor. There are two human figures positioned at the center, suggesting scale and intended use for performances or presentations. Metal railings run along the back and sides of the stage for safety, while lighting or camera equipment is visible at the front and sides. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for public events, concerts, or ceremonies in urban parks or plazas. The structure appears robust, with a combination of wood, metal, and composite materials.
description: A modern, semi-circular outdoor stage with wooden flooring, metal railings, and large graphic backdrops, designed for public performances or events.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved stage edge, central stairs, and the full width of the backdrop panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the stairs, side railings, and partial visibility of the stage floor and backdrops.
description_view_2: Direct view of the stage front, with both human figures, central emblem, and all three backdrop panels clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the other set of stairs, side railings, and a clear look at the stage's depth and floor design.
